Projects

ECHO - Exploration of Celestial Homes for Observation (demo)

C++ Python Entity-Component Frameworks Unreal Engine's Graphical Blueprints 3D Modeling and Lighting Linux Shell Scripting

A prototype high-fidelity 3D test bed for simulating autonomous navigation capabilities of Mars planetary rovers in a controllable Mars-Analog environment. The test bed allows users to perform experiments which evaluate the outputs of autonomous navigation tasks (e.g., rover surface terrain image segmentation).

Pilgrim (TurtleBot3) Planetary Rover

ROS 2 Foxy Python Linux (Ubuntu 20.04) TurtleBot3 Gazebo Classic RViz

Pilgrim is a ROS 2 TurtleBot lidar noise injection node in normal and dust / sandstorm conditions. I include a demo here for demonstration of TurtleBot3 navigation with ML-based LiDAR sensor noise injection and comparison.
